revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: undo wikidata additions from past 2 hours
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: overwriting

1 revision imported: importing [[Template:Commons category]] from English wikipedia with removed timestamps to overwrite existing code, attempting to fix an error that makes the link not properly appear.
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23176857634|manual triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Commons_templates_see_also here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Commons_templates_see_also for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Col-float|width=40em}}
* {{Section link|Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Layout#External links}}
* {{tl|Commons}}—shows Commons box
* {{tl|Commons-inline}}—shows Commons gallery inline
* {{tl|Commons category}}—shows Commons category box
* {{tl|Commons category-inline}}—shows Commons category inline
* {{tl|Commons category multi}}—to list up to six categories
* {{tl|Commons and category}}—shows Commons box with both gallery and category
* {{tl|Commons and category inline}}—shows Commons gallery and category inline
* {{tl|Copy to Wikimedia Commons}}
* {{tl|Wikimedia Commons redirect}}—specialized soft redirect template for Commons
* {{tl|Wiki category}}—to link to a gallery hosted on Wikipedia
* [[mw:Manual:Pywikibot/commonscat.py]]
{{Col-float-break}}
* {{tl|Sister project links}}—to link all Wikinews, Wikisource, [[WP:Wikimedia sister projects|etc.]]
* {{tl|Wikibooks}} / {{tl|Wikibooks inline}}
* {{tl|Wikidata property}}
* {{tl|Wikinews}} / {{tl|Wikinews inline}}
* {{tl|Wikiquote}} / {{tl|Wikiquote-inline}}
* {{tl|Wikisource}} / {{tl|Wikisource-inline}}
* {{tl|Wikispecies}} / {{tl|Wikispecies-inline}}
* {{tl|Wikiversity}} / {{tl|Wikiversity inline}}
* {{tl|Wikivoyage}} / {{tl|Wikivoyage inline}}
* {{tl|Wiktionary}} / {{tl|Wiktionary-inline}}
{{Col-float-end}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
